tasks.label: Deploy CORS fix v1.10.11
tasks.command: npx wrangler deploy --config packages/workers/outseta-plan-worker/wrangler.toml && npx wrangler deploy --config packages/workers/cvr-worker/wrangler.toml && git add -A && git commit -m "v1.10.11: add www.anvisninger.dk to ALLOWED_ORIGINS in both workers" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Build and deploy v1.10.12
tasks.command: node scripts/build-signup-flow.mjs && npx wrangler deploy --config packages/workers/cvr-worker/wrangler.toml && git add -A && git commit -m "v1.10.12: fix 404 as non-critical user error; guard setCriticalError; Danish CVR not-found message" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Fix gitignore
tasks.command: echo '.wrangler/' >> .gitignore && git rm -r --cached packages/workers/cvr-worker/.wrangler 2>/dev/null; git add .gitignore && git commit -m "chore: add .wrangler to .gitignore" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Deploy v1.10.13
tasks.command: npx wrangler deploy --config packages/workers/cvr-worker/wrangler.toml && git add -A && git commit -m "v1.10.13: translate upstream 404/error messages to Danish" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Build and deploy v1.10.14
tasks.command: node scripts/build-signup-flow.mjs && npx wrangler deploy --config packages/workers/cvr-worker/wrangler.toml && git add -A && git commit -m "v1.10.14: translate remaining English errors to Danish; remove dead code" && git push origin main
